name: multi-ai-assistant
description: Chrome extension: split-screen dashboard for multiple AI providers

scripts.lint: eslint *.js *.mjs content/*.js dashboard/*.js pages/*.js shared/*.js shared/*.mjs session/*.mjs tests/e2e/**/*.mjs tests/content/**/*.test.js tests/session/**/*.test.mjs tests/dashboard/**/*.test.mjs tests/i18n/**/*.test.js tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.validate: node -e "const m = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8')); if(!m.manifest_version||!m.name||!m.version) throw new Error('Invalid manifest'); console.log('manifest.json OK: v' + m.version);"
